name: Salon De Holmes
overview: Four overlooked housewives, weighed down by daily chores and ignored by those around them, find renewed purpose by solving everyday cases—reclaiming their voices and reigniting long-forgotten dreams.

trailers.title: [Trailer] DASOM (다솜) "살롱 드 홈즈" 6/16(월) 밤 10시 ENA 첫 방송 . COMING SOON
